description: Detects when Finance/relevant committee members (AI policy, export controls, antitrust) go silent during stock dips. Zero trades in 45+ days while stock corrects 3%+ from 30d high = structural headwind signal. Returns: silent_committee_members, correction_pct_from_high, regulatory_risk_vector, silent_members_detail with days_silent and oversight_areas.
upgrade_trigger: Upgrade to 1.00/call at confidence 5/5 (Congress rebalancing trade confirmed)
validation: NVDA: Session #2 (2026-04-30) predicted bearish 4w at 209.25. Session #5 (2026-05-02): 198.45, -8.38% from 30d high. 8 committee members silent (Angus King 285d, Mullin 124d, Whitehouse 113d). STRONG signal confirmed.
moat: No competitor tracks absence + committee context. Competitors track positive trades. We monetize the silence. First mover in absence interpretation = moat in tokenized equity era.
